question.ask: 10. Who thinks the rules are too strict?

info.value: I'm Mike. My parents are strict with me. They have made some family rules for me. The first rule is to study hard at school. Besides, I must go home after school at once. I have to go to bed before 10 pm on school nights. But during the holidays, I can stay up late. Moreover, I have to clean my room. My parents will get angry if I leave things around the house. I should keep my room tidy. My friends think the rules are too strict. But I'm proud of myself because I've developed good habits because of the rules.
